purpose: First baseline execution after the smoke bring-up. This command is Qwen/local-only and must not use the OpenAI smoke override.

blocked_conditions.reason: EN-ID human translation review is pending. Do not run or report ID monolingual baselines as valid benchmark evidence until config/translation_review.json is complete and scripts/validate_translation_review.py passes.

preconditions.why: Baseline episodes must call the local NegotiationArena checkout.
Baselines are benchmark evidence and must use local cached Qwen, local Qwen/vLLM, or a later explicitly wired Modal Qwen endpoint, not the OpenAI smoke override.
C1 ID prompts require human bilingual review before they are valid benchmark evidence.
